lead_profile_text: R2R — Manchester M13. Existing rent-to-rent property underperforming on online platforms. Margin too thin after rent to landlord, platform fees, and Stayful management fee layer. Classic R2R abandonment pattern.
emotional_profile: Business-minded R2R operator struggling with margins; open to solutions but cost structure made Stayful management financially unviable

top_objections.text: R2R margin too thin after rent to landlord, platform fees, and Stayful management fee added on top
Property already underperforming on online platforms — baseline is low

top_questions.text: Can Stayful's direct booking strategy and profitability plan close the margin gap?
top_questions.answer: Direct booking strategy discussed but insufficient to overcome the three-layer cost structure (rent + platform fees + management fee)

what_moved_them: Direct booking strategy discussed as potential uplift mechanism
what_fell_flat: Three-layer cost structure (landlord rent + platform fees + management fee) makes Stayful unviable for R2R
Platform underperformance meant even improved management could not generate sufficient margin

conversion_gaps.gap: R2R cost structure fundamentally incompatible with adding a management fee layer
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Pre-qualify R2R leads on margin before web meeting; if net after rent is below ~£X threshold, redirect or disqualify before committing to a full meeting
